info.name: Tour SaaS API
info.description: B2C Tour Booking Platform API with Razorpay Integration

request.description: Register a new user
Register a new agent (self-registration)
Unified login endpoint for all roles

Login or Register with Google.
Verifies the ID token from Google and logs in the user.
Creates a new account if one doesn't exist.
Send OTP for agent login after verifying credentials
Verify OTP and complete login for Agent, Customer, or Sub-User
Get current user information

Get public agent information based on domain.
Used for branding the login page.
Initiate password reset flow
Verify OTP provided by user
Reset password using verified OTP
List all bookings for current user
Create a new booking
Get booking by ID

Preview refund amount before confirming cancellation.
Read-only — no DB changes.

Cancel a booking and trigger Razorpay refund if applicable.
Uses SELECT FOR UPDATE + single transaction for safety.
List all bookings (Admin only)

Confirm booking after payment:
1. Verify Payment
2. Book Flight (if application)
3. Finalize Package Booking

Review flight before payment.
Calls TripJack Review API and saves the returned bookingId.
Download booking invoice as PDF
Create Razorpay order for booking
Verify Razorpay payment signature
Mark a booking payment as failed (e.g. on modal dismissal)
Get payment details

Search for tours and activities using Amadeus API

This endpoint:
1. Geocodes the destination name to lat/long using Geoapify
2. Searches Amadeus Tours & Activities API
3. Returns normalized tour packages
Get detailed information for a specific Amadeus activity

Search for flights using TripJack API

Returns:
    List of available flight options with pricing and details

query.description: (Required) Airport name or city to search

request.description:
Search for airports by name or city

Note: This is a placeholder. In production, integrate with airport database.
Get all templates
Create a new package template
Get template details with all activities
Add an activity to a template day
Update a template activity
Delete a template activity

Create a new user itinerary from a template
Auto-populates with default activities from the template
Get all itineraries for the current user
Get a specific itinerary with all activities
Add a custom activity to the itinerary
Remove an activity from the itinerary
Update itinerary status

Get available package durations for a destination, filtered by the current agent's context.
Returns a list of distinct duration_days (e.g., [4, 6, 8]).

Get available date ranges for packages matching filters.
Returns: [{"from": "YYYY-MM-DD", "to": "YYYY-MM-DD"}, ...]

Get list of popular destinations based on packages marked as is_public=True.
Returns deduplicated list by destination with the most recently updated package image.
Get unique destination/country suggestions based on public packages of the current agent.
List all packages with filters
Create a new package (Admin only)

Get the lowest-priced published package for the current user's assigned agent 
(or the agent themselves).
Get package by slug
Get package by ID
Update a package (Admin only)
Delete a package (Admin only)
Download package itinerary as PDF
Search packages by destination
Get package with day-wise time-slotted itinerary

item.name: Get Package With Itinerary By Slug

request.description: Get package with day-wise time-slotted itinerary by slug
Add itinerary item with time slot to package (Admin only)
Update itinerary item (Admin only)
Delete itinerary item (Admin only)

Create a booking with optional itinerary customizations
Allows users to remove default activities or add custom ones
Get booking with all customizations and final itinerary
List bookings for the current agent's packages
Get booking details if owned by agent
Update booking status
Search customers belonging to the agent by name or email.

Agent quick-creates a CUSTOMER account during the booking flow.
Auto-generates a temp password; optionally emails credentials to the customer.
List all customers belonging to the agent
Create a new customer for the agent (full form with password)
Enable or disable a customer account owned by the agent
Delete a customer account owned by the agent
List packages owned by current agent with pagination
Create a new package for the agent

body.raw:
{
  "title": "example_title",
  "slug": "example_slug",
  "destination": "example_destination",
  "duration_days": 1,
  "duration_nights": 1,
  "trip_style": "example_trip_style",
  "category": "example_category",
  "price_per_person": 1.0,
  "max_group_size": 20,
  "description": "example_description",
  "country": "example_country",
  "is_public": true,
  "included_items": [
    "example_included_items"
  ],
  "excluded_items": [
    "example_excluded_items"
  ],
  "feature_image_url": "example_feature_image_url",
  "package_mode": "single",
  "destinations": [
    {}
  ],
  "activities": [
    "example_activities"
  ],
  "gst_applicable": true,
  "gst_percentage": 1.0,
  "gst_mode": "example_gst_mode",
  "flights_enabled": false,
  "flight_origin_cities": [
    "example_flight_origin_cities"
  ],
  "flight_cabin_class": "ECONOMY",
  "flight_price_included": false,
  "flight_baggage_note": "example_flight_baggage_note",
  "created_by": "example_created_by",
  "cancellation_enabled": false,
  "cancellation_rules": [
    {
      "daysBefore": 1,
      "refundPercentage": 1.0,
      "fareType": "example_fareType"
    }
  ],
  "booking_type": "example_booking_type",
  "price_label": "example_price_label",
  "enquiry_payment": "example_enquiry_payment",
  "inclusions": {},
  "exclusions": {},
  "custom_services": [
    {
      "id": "example_id",
      "heading": "example_heading",
      "description": "example_description",
      "isIncluded": true,
      "visibleToCustomer": true
    }
  ],
  "trip_style_ids": [
    "example_trip_style_ids"
  ],
  "activity_tag_ids": [
    "example_activity_tag_ids"
  ],
  "trip_styles": [],
  "activity_tags": []
}

request.description: Delete a package
Toggle package publish status
Add an activity to package itinerary
Update an itinerary item
Delete an itinerary item
Reorder itinerary items
Get aggregated stats for admin dashboard with date filtering
Simple package list that works
Simple package creation that works
Update an existing package
Get package with itinerary - simple version
Delete package - simple version
Add itinerary item - simple version
Delete itinerary item - simple version
Update itinerary item - simple version
Update package status
Duplicate all items from a day and shift subsequent days
Delete all items for a day and shift subsequent days down
Delete all items for a day without shifting
Copy all items from one day to another (Merge)
Get stats for agent dashboard with date filtering
Get the most recent active session for the logged-in user
Get all active trip planning sessions for the current user
Get list of popular destinations derived from packages where is_public = true.
Check if destination has matching packages
Create a trip planning session
Get trip planning session
Update trip planning session itinerary
Delete (cancel) a trip planning session
List all subscription plans
Create a new subscription plan (Admin only)
List all subscription plans (Active & Inactive) for Admin
Delete a subscription plan (Admin only)
Update a subscription plan (Admin only)
List all user subscriptions (Admin only)
Update a subscription status (Admin only)
Get current user's subscription history (resolves parent agent for sub-users)

Called on every subscription page load.
1. Checks if current active plan is expired (by precise expires_at).
2. If expired → marks it expired, auto-activates next queued plan.
3. Returns new state so frontend can show correct UI without a full reload.
Manually activate an upcoming subscription
Upgrade or subscribe to a plan
List current user's invoices
Initiate subscription purchase (Razorpay)
Verify subscription payment and activate

Request cancellation of a subscription.
This does NOT cancel the subscription immediately.
It notifies all admins via email and in-portal notifications.

Mark a notification as read
Clear all notifications for the current agent/user
Delete a notification
Get all settings for the current agent.

Update or create SMTP settings.
Test SMTP configuration by sending a test email to the agent's email.
Update or create Razorpay settings.
Update homepage customization settings.

request.description: Update website pages (About, Contact) customization settings.
Get public settings (brand name, homepage customizations) for the current domain.

Send a test email using a custom HTML template.
Rate limited to 5 per hour per agent.
Send a message to the AI Assistant and get a response
Generate a complete tour package from the conversation
Get conversation history by ID
Delete a conversation
Extract search filters from natural language query using Gemini
Upload a file to S3
Generate a presigned URL for direct upload to S3
Get subscription summary statistics
Get month-wise or year-wise subscription trends
Get plan-wise subscription analytics
Get subscription renewal vs cancellation statistics
Get total revenue summary
Get month-wise or year-wise revenue trends
Get revenue generated by each agent
Get revenue share by subscription plan
Get payment status breakdown
Get booking summary statistics
Get booking and enquiry performance metrics by agent
Get most popular packages
Get booking conversion rates
Handle Razorpay Webhooks (Subscription, Refund events)

Get all activities. 
Agents can see platform activities (agent_id=None) and their own activities.

Create a new activity.
If the user is an admin, they can potentially create platform activities, but for now we default to setting agent_id unless specified.
Get all unique destinations and their activity counts with pagination.
Create or update destination metadata (image, description, etc.)
Update destination metadata and handle renaming across the system.
Delete all activities and metadata for a specific destination owned by the current user.

Get chart data for the agent's reports

Get financial metrics aggregated by date for the agent

Edit sub-user name, phone, role label, and permissions.
Permanently delete a sub-user and their auth account.
Fully replace the permission set for a sub-user.
Toggle active/inactive status for a sub-user.
Generate a new temporary password and email it to the sub-user.

query.description: Country name to fetch cities for

request.description:
Fetch all cities for a given country.
If no country is provided, returns an empty list or could return popular global cities.

Get popular destinations grouped by location and count how many packages exist per destination.
Only shows destinations that have at least 1 published package.
Sorted by highest package count first.

Public endpoint to create an enquiry. 
Can be for a specific package or a General Enquiry.
Auth is optional but will link customer_id if logged in.
List enquiries for the authenticated agent or sub-user
Get detailed enquiry information
Update enquiry status or agent notes
Convert a confirmed enquiry into a booking
Analyze the enquiry message using AI to extract travel parameters
Generate a PDF quote and store it in history
Send the generated PDF quote to the customer via email
Retrieve the history of quotes sent for this enquiry
Return paginated API logs with optional filters.
Return high-level summary: total, success, error counts, avg duration, method breakdown.
Return complete details for a single log entry.
Delete a single log entry.

query.description: Delete logs older than this many days

request.description: Delete log entries older than `older_than_days` days.

Receives an error report from the frontend (runtime or API failure)
and sends an email notification.
Root endpoint
Health check endpoint
